expected_path_note: sensitive_country_check=No (Norway - strong procurement oversight, low corruption) -> exit
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 09 – National Rail Contractor Norway Low Risk Country
activities: Fjellbane AS builds railway tunnels and track sections for the Norwegian national railway administration under competitively tendered contracts published on the national procurement portal. Around 90% of its revenues come from these Norwegian state contracts. It has no projects outside Norway.
origin_of_assets: Retained earnings from Norwegian rail contracts.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: Tunnel-boring equipment and receivables from the Norwegian state.
